title: relocate-e2etest-to-internal-e2etest
description:
Move e2etest/ → internal/e2etest/ and update all references.

## What to do

1. Move the directory: e2etest/ → internal/e2etest/
2. Update the Go module import path everywhere:
   - All files in internal/e2etest/ itself (package stays e2etest)
   - guard/ test files that import e2etest (guard/integration_test.go, etc.)
   - cmd/dcg-go/ test files if any import e2etest
   - Any other files: grep for "e2etest" across the codebase
3. Update Makefile: replace ./e2etest with ./internal/e2etest in ALL targets
   (test-e2e, test-stress, test-security, test-mutation, test-comparison, bench, bench-full)
4. Update CLAUDE.md project structure to show internal/e2etest/ instead of e2etest/
5. Run make test && make test-e2e to verify everything passes
6. Commit

## Why

Having e2etest/ at the top level means it can't import unexported internal APIs
without those APIs being exported to external consumers. At internal/e2etest/,
we can export helpers within internal/ (e.g. eval test helpers, parse test helpers)
that are visible to the test package but not to external importers.
